Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: pins (jewelry) [300046006], jewelry worn on costume [300209292], jewelry by location [300211901], jewelry [300209286], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Long, straight pins with a decorative head and sometimes a sheath for encasing the point.
Alfiler largo y derecho, con una cabeza decorativa, y con frecuencia con un funda para encajar la punta.
Lange, rechte sierspelden met een versierde knop en soms een dopje als omhulsel voor de punt.
長且直的飾針，有裝飾性的前端，有時附有護套以包住尖頭。
